texto: Everyone knows that physicists are concerned with the laws of the universe and have the audacity sometimes to think they have discovered the choices God made when He created the universe in thus and such a pattern. Mathematicians are even more audacious. What they feel they discover are the laws that God Himself could not avoid having to follow.
explicacao: Citação de David Mumford sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Everyone knows that physicists are concerned with the laws of the universe and have the audacity …” articula reflexao, god, mathematics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mathematics e physics.
